# Posten Roofing

## Summary
Posten Roofing is a residential roofing company serving Sun Prairie, Madison, and Dane County, Wisconsin. We provide free roof inspections, storm damage assessment, roof repair, roof replacement, and insurance documentation support.

## Contact
- Phone: (608) 217-5056
- Website: https://postenroofing.com
- Location: Sun Prairie, Wisconsin

## Services
- Free Roof Inspections: No-obligation inspection with photo documentation
- Roof Repair: Missing shingles, leaks, flashing, pipe boots, ridge caps, emergency tarping
- Roof Replacement: Full tear-off and replacement with quality materials
- Storm Damage Inspection: Hail, wind, and severe weather damage assessment
- Insurance Claims Documentation: Photo documentation, written scope/estimate, adjuster meetings
- Preventative Maintenance: Periodic inspections to extend roof life

## Service Area
Primary: Sun Prairie, Madison, DeForest, Waunakee, Cottage Grove, Windsor, Marshall
Additional: Columbus, Beaver Dam, Lake Mills, Waterloo, Cambridge, Deerfield
Range: Approximately 35-40 minutes from Sun Prairie, Wisconsin

## Key Facts
- Repair-first approach: We recommend repair when it makes sense, not unnecessary replacement
- Free inspections: No cost, no obligation, no pressure
- Photo documentation: We show you what we find with clear photos
- Family roofing background: Built on hands-on experience from a family roofing company
- Insurance support: We document damage and can meet with adjusters (insurance companies make all claim decisions)
- We do not waive deductibles or provide insurance/legal advice

## Hours
Monday-Saturday: 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM
